title: capnites peduncularis
intro: Capnites peduncularis, also known as the climbing capnites, is a plant species within the family of Capparaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds like flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. The plant is known to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, contributing to its health benefits such as wound healing, immune system support, and protection against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Capnites peduncularis is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
